---
title: "Learning"
author: "Milaotou"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    code_folding: hide
    css: styles.css
---
# <span style="display: none;">设置代码块全局选项</span>{.unnumbered}
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = TRUE,
	fig.align = "center",
	fig.height = 8,
	fig.width = 10,
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE,
	tidy = TRUE
)
library(rstudioapi)
setwd(dirname(getActiveDocumentContext()$path))
getwd()
```

# 加载包
```{r libraries}

```




```{r}

```

# Session info {.unnumbered}
```{r session-info}
sessioninfo::session_info()
```


```{r}
# 加载必要的包
library(ggplot2)

# 根据PDI和Z-average生成粒径分布数据
# PDI = 0.137, Z-average ≈ 46.02 nm
# 使用对数正态分布来模拟DLS数据

# 计算对数正态分布参数
pdi <- 0.137
z_avg <- 46.02

# 对于对数正态分布: PDI = exp(σ²) - 1
# 因此: σ = sqrt(ln(PDI + 1))
sigma <- sqrt(log(pdi + 1))

# 对数正态分布的均值: μ = ln(z_avg) - σ²/2
mu <- log(z_avg) - sigma^2/2

# 生成粒径数据点(对数刻度)
size <- seq(1, 1000, length.out = 500)

# 计算对数正态分布的概率密度
# 需要转换为intensity分布
log_size <- log(size)
density <- dlnorm(size, meanlog = mu, sdlog = sigma)

# 将密度转换为intensity百分比(归一化到峰值约12%)
intensity <- density / max(density) * 11.8

# 创建数据框
data <- data.frame(
  size = size,
  intensity = intensity
)

# 绘图
ggplot(data, aes(x = size, y = intensity)) +
  geom_line(color = "#D63230", linewidth = 1) +
  scale_x_log10(
    breaks = c(1, 10, 100, 1000),
    labels = c("1", "10", "100", "1000"),
    limits = c(1, 1000)
  ) +
  annotation_logticks(sides = "b", size = 0.3, short = unit(0.05, "cm"), 
                      mid = unit(0.1, "cm"), long = unit(0.15, "cm")) +
    scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 15, by = 5),
    limits = c(0, 15)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Size Distribution by Intensity       PDI=0.137",
    x = "Size (d.nm)",
    y = "Intensity (Percent)"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray80", linetype = "dotted"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "gray80", linetype = "dotted", linewidth = 0.3),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 12, face = "plain"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9, color = "black"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.15, "cm"),
    panel.border = element_blank()
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(1, 1200), ylim = c(0, 15), expand = FALSE)
# png("p.png",width = 6,height = 4,unit = "in",res = 600,family = "serif")
# dev.off()
# 打印一些统计信息
cat("模拟参数:\n")
cat("PDI:", pdi, "\n")
cat("Z-average:", z_avg, "nm\n")
cat("峰值位置:", size[which.max(intensity)], "nm\n")
cat("最大强度:", max(intensity), "%\n")

```

# Save plot
ggsave("p.png", width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

```

# Session info
```{r session-info}
sessioninfo::session_info()
```
